_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Audit Universe & Entity sample payload. 10 entities total, 2 scored. Categories: High Risk/Monthly (1 entity), Medium Risk/Quarterly (1). 8 unscored entities. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per entity. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

riskDistribution.description: 2 scored entities: 1 High Risk (Monthly), 1 Medium Risk (Quarterly). 8 entities unscored.

priorityEntities.description: Top 2 entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
